programme.title: Drive TV - Drive Car of the Year
programme.desc: Sam Purcell takes the Kia Tasman on an off-road adventure to Sunnyside Ridge, setting up camp for the ultimate weekend getaway.

programme.title: Reel Destinations
programme.desc: Join Dyllon Schulz and the Reel Destinations crew on an epic fishing adventure as they catch and cook their way around Queensland.

programme.title: Oz Off Road TV
programme.desc: The crew complete the Gibb River Road and head to Broome, get up close and personal with crocodiles and finish up at what's arguably Australia's best camp spot.

programme.title: NRL Sunday Footy
programme.desc: Wide World of Sports presents Sharks v Tigers, live from Shark Stadium. Join our expert commentary team for all the action, analysis and post match interviews. Kick off at 4:05PM AEST.

programme.title: NBN News - Sunday
programme.desc: NBN presents the latest in news, sport and weather locally, nationally and around the world.

programme.title: The Floor
programme.desc: Nearly half the original 81 players have been eliminated. Tonight, The Floor awards its biggest player advantage ever. As the game heats up, who will win a cool run to the finals with The Freeze?

programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.desc: 60 Minutes is Australia's leading current affairs program, with a proven record of excellence over five decades. Join television's top reporters as they uncover, investigate and analyse the issues affecting all Australians.

programme.title: Australian Crime Stories: The Investigators
programme.desc: The Investigators delves into the tragic case of Rachel Barber, a 15-year-old aspiring dancer whose 1999 disappearance shocked Melbourne.

programme.title: 9News Late
programme.desc: Join the 9News Late team for all of the day's top stories from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: A father of two is gunned down while standing up for his cousin. When an unidentified woman found shot and burned resembles a suspect in a home invasion, New Orleans detectives suspect a connection.

programme.title: American Ripper
programme.desc: Myths about the Ripper are challenged while trying to connect H.H. Holmes to Jack the Ripper.

programme.title: Oz Off Road TV
programme.desc: The crew complete the Gibb River Road and head to Broome, get up close and personal with crocodiles and finish up at what's arguably Australia's best camp spot.

programme.desc: Home shopping program.

programme.title: TV Shop - Home Shopping
programme.desc: Home shopping program.

programme.title: Skippy - The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: Classic Australian series. Jerry is asked by a friend to be the best man at a wedding, but can he make it to the church on time?

programme.title: The Garden Gurus
programme.desc: This week on The Garden Gurus, Bonnie shares helpful tips on growing and caring for fruit trees and citrus, while Sue reflects on one of her favourite Gurus trips, the 2007 Singapore Garden Festival.

programme.title: Today Early News
programme.desc: Today Early News with up to date news from Australia and around the world as well as the latest in sport and weather.

programme.title: Today
programme.desc: Join Karl Stefanovic and Sarah Abo and the TODAY team as they bring you the latest in news, current affairs, sports, politics, entertainment, fashion, health and lifestyle.

programme.title: Today
programme.desc: Join Karl Stefanovic and Sarah Abo and the TODAY team as they bring you the latest in news, current affairs, sports, politics, entertainment, fashion, health and lifestyle.

programme.title: Today Extra
programme.desc: An exciting mix of topical issues, the best celebrity interviews, cooking with Australia's top chefs, live music performances, and the latest in fashion and beauty trends.

programme.title: 9News Morning
programme.desc: Join 9News for up to the minute news on local and international news including sport and weather.

programme.title: The Floor
programme.desc: Nearly half the original 81 players have been eliminated. Tonight, The Floor awards its biggest player advantage ever. As the game heats up, who will win a cool run to the finals with The Freeze?

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: This week on Getaway; a kids guide to Canberra, exploring the creative side of the Sri Lankan city of Colombo plus a Margaret River foodie tour.

programme.title: My Way
programme.sub-title: TTNQ Good Food - Troppical Trail Tastes
programme.desc: Tim Blackwell introduces four inspirational Aussies, each with a unique story. He allows people to tell their own stories first-hand, to say, \.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Hosted by Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman. Four teams of two contestants attempt to find correct answers to four rounds of general knowledge questions, with the winning team eligible to compete for the show's cash jackpot.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player with the skill and strategy to see off their human rivals and conquer the machine. Hosted by Ben Shepherd.

programme.title: 9News Afternoon
programme.desc: 9News Afternoon, live and local with the latest news across Australia and around the world including sport and weather.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Tipping Point Australia will push contestants' luck to the very edge. 3 contestants will go head to head against with one lucky contestant playing for the Jackpot. Hosted by Todd Woodbridge.

programme.title: NBN News
programme.desc: NBN presents the latest in news, sport and weather locally, nationally and around the world.

programme.title: A Current Affair
programme.desc: Covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities, and entertainment, all investigated by a dedicated team.

programme.title: The Floor
programme.desc: 40 players are still vying for the $200,000 grand prize. A returning dueller cements his place on the floor.

programme.title: 100% Footy
programme.desc: Phil Gould, Paul Gallen, Cam Smith, Allana Ferguson and James Bracey debate the biggest issues in Rugby League alongside the game's most influential figures.

programme.title: 9News Late
programme.desc: Join the 9News Late team for all of the day's top stories from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: To meet a massive opal order, The Misfits use untested contraptions and work all night. Dan and Renee's new claim is a bust, and The Cheals' operation is in a tailspin after a bombshell departure.

programme.title: Footy Classified
programme.desc: Big names and agenda-setters lock horns on Footy Classified. Join Sam McClure, Matthew Lloyd, Jimmy Bartel and Damian Barrett as they bring you footy's most confrontational program.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player with the skill and strategy to see off their human rivals and conquer the machine. Hosted by Ben Shepherd.

programme.title: Hello SA
programme.desc: We see what's new at Tasting Australia, hit the road with Tom Jonas to the Barossa, introduce the new Hospital Research Home Lottery Grand Prize and explore Living Choice Mt Barker.

programme.desc: Classic Australian series. Sonny and Skippy help a young scientist with her research of the Port Jackson shark.

programme.desc: Covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities, and entertainment, all investigated by a dedicated team.

programme.title: Today Extra
programme.desc: An exciting mix of topical issues, the best celebrity interviews, cooking with Australia's top chefs, live music performances, and the latest in fashion and beauty trends.

programme.title: 9News Morning
programme.desc: Join 9News for up to the minute news on local and international news including sport and weather.

programme.title: The Floor
programme.desc: 40 players are still vying for the $200,000 grand prize. A returning dueller cements his place on the floor.

programme.title: Destination WA
programme.desc: On todays show, Trevor explores the Fishing Serrurier Island, uncovering crystal waters, rich marine life and rugged coastline beauty in an unforgettable WA adventure across the pristine offshore paradise. More adventures await across WA!

programme.title: My Way
programme.desc: Tim Blackwell introduces inspirational Aussies, each with a unique story about how they live their best life. It's a lifestyle program that allows people to tell their own stories firsthand to say, 'I'm doing this My Way'.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Hosted by Alexander Armstrong. In each episode four teams of two contestants attempt to find correct but obscure answers to four rounds of general knowledge questions, with the winning team eligible to compete for the show's cash jackpot.
